# GooCampus — Medical PG Abroad: 1:1 Career Strategy Session

> A personalised 60-minute 1:1 consultation with GooCampus' Chief Counsellor for doctors planning postgraduate medical training abroad. Compare countries, licensing pathways, costs and timelines, and leave with a clear roadmap. Price: ₹10,000 (INR).

## What it is
- A one-to-one, 60-minute strategy session with an experienced Chief Counsellor who has guided 1,100+ doctors over 11 years.
- Personalised to your academic background, internship status, career goals and finances.
- Covers up to three countries in detail.

## Countries / pathways covered
India, Australia, United Kingdom, USA, Gulf (UAE), Canada, Germany, New Zealand, Ireland.

## What's included (₹10,000)
- 60-minute personalised 1:1 consultation
- Guidance for up to 3 countries
- Comprehensive post-session report: session summary, personalised pathway recommendations, licensing breakdown, estimated costs, registration timelines, alternative pathways, specialty-specific guidance, portfolio improvement recommendations, official resources, action plan
- WhatsApp community access
- Free access to one future webinar on your target country
- Free Australia & New Zealand Pathway Handbook

## Who it's for
Indian MBBS graduates, foreign medical graduates (FMGs), final-year MBBS students, interns preparing early, and practising doctors exploring specialist pathways or international careers.

## What it is NOT
It does not guarantee admissions, residency positions, jobs or visas. It provides honest, personalised, evidence-based guidance so doctors can make informed decisions.

## Booking
Book the ₹10,000 session here: https://rzp.io/rzp/GH5iPqt

## Organisation
GooCampus Edu Solutions Pvt. Ltd.
Address: #138/6, Ground Floor, 10th Main Road, 6th A Cross, Sadashiv Nagar, RMV Extension, Behind SBI Bank, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560080, India
